mews.title: Mews PMS & Omniboost Integration
mews.description: Covers everything about Mews and the Omniboost integration: Bronze/Silver/Gold tiers, accounting flows (Consumed, Closed, Hybrid), GL mapping, onboarding steps, POS connections, receivable tracking, and all supported systems.

omniboost.title: Omniboost Platform & Products
omniboost.description: Covers what Omniboost is, its five core products (Accounting, PMS, POS, Insights, Owners Portal), how it connects hospitality systems, and the industries and business types it serves.

mews-help-center/onboarding-guide-mews-t.title: Onboarding Guide | Mews to Accounting | Omniboost Help Center

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ba.title: Balance sheet | Omniboost Help Center
omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ba.description: Defines a balance sheet as a financial statement reporting assets, liabilities, and shareholders' equity at a specific point in time.

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/co.title: Cost centers / Profit centers / Tracking categories | Omniboost Help Center

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/dy.title: Dynamics between Receivable Tracking in MEWS and Omniboost Accounting Integrations | Omniboost Help Center

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ex.description: Step-by-step guide to resolve the Exact Online 'Forbidden - user division is not within division scope' error by configuring app permissions.

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ga.title: Gateway commission costs | Omniboost Help Center
omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ga.description: Explains how gateway commission costs from Stripe and Adyen are automatically posted to ledger accounts for easier payment reconciliation.

omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ge.title: General journal code | Omniboost Help Center
omniboost-help-center/tips-and-tricks/ge.description: Explains what a general journal code is and recommends creating a separate one for accounting integrations.
